creator: joseph@randomnetworks.com
text:
It's just a version bump, looks fine to commit.

On Fri, Jul 23, 2010 at 8:30 AM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/activitymail,
>
> Please note that PR ports/148865 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> =C2=A0 =C2=A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/148865
